description: Paged list of token holders, optionally sorted (TokenHoldersGet).
notes: order: TokenHoldersSortField — 0=BALANCE, 1=TRANSFERS_COUNT (varies by node build). desc: true=descending. Older node builds may not support 'desc' — the gateway falls back to the 4-arg form automatically. Aliases: 'Token', 'Offset', 'Limit', 'Order', 'Desc'.
